top_categories.workout_context: At mile 60 of 87, glycogen is gone. This workout teaches your body to produce watts on fumes.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Sea Otter Ciclobrava's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before September.
6,562ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
75ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Sea Otter Ciclobrava. Train it until it feels boring.
Sea Otter Ciclobrava's paved road with Girona's iconic mid-mountain forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 87 miles.
Every hard session works better with a bigger aerobic base. At 87 miles, base fitness is the difference between racing and surviving.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 6,562ft of climbing on paved road with Girona's iconic mid-mountain does to your power file on race day.
Two threshold sessions per week without the recovery cost of VO2max work. For 87 miles, sustainable FTP gains matter more than peak power.
At Sea Otter Ciclobrava, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
The aerobic base that lets you ride paved road with Girona's iconic mid-mountain at tempo for 87 miles without cracking. No shortcuts.
Tempo is Sea Otter Ciclobrava's race pace. The wattage you'll hold for 87 miles on paved road with Girona's iconic mid-mountain. Train it until it's automatic.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 60–80g carbs/hour for Sea Otter Ciclobrava’s 87 miles. Start fueling within the first 30 minutes — early fueling prevents late-race collapse. Bonking at mile 60 is a nutrition failure, not a fitness failure.
race_overlay.altitude: Moderate altitude at Sea Otter Ciclobrava. Arrive 2–3 days early. Reduce intensity expectations by 5–10%. Hydrate aggressively.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Durability, Race Simulation, and VO2max to prepare you for 87 miles of paved road with girona's iconic mid-mountain passes in Girona, Costa Brava, Spain.
